sizing_rule.note: Position sizing derived from geometric optimal portfolio allocation using GHPR^N relationship to match arithmetic portfolio TWR. Requires calculation of optimal_f from geometric mean performance and solving for N trades to equate cumulative growth targets (GTWR). Parameters optimal_f and trade count N are signal-dependent and must be derived from historical performance data.

source_rule_text: Position sizing should be determined by calculating the number of trades required for a geometric optimal portfolio to match the performance of an arithmetic portfolio, using GHPR and GTWR relationships to establish proper leverage across N trades.
